description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a natural, light wood grain finish. The tabletop is flat and smooth, supported by four straight, sturdy legs positioned at each corner. The wood grain pattern runs lengthwise along the tabletop, giving it a clean and modern appearance. The legs are simple and unadorned, matching the tabletop in both color and material. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist design. This table is suitable for communal or work-related activities in urban parks, public spaces, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A minimalist rectangular wooden table with a light wood grain finish and four straight legs, designed for functional use in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow edge of the tabletop and two front legs, highlighting the table's length and thickness.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full tabletop surface and all four legs, emphasizing the table's rectangular shape and sturdy construction.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite narrow edge and two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tabletop and all four legs from the other side.
